PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $250.99 SERVED JUL-03-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PETITT, IDA MARYANNE
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED ON 12/07/2021 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/7/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT PETITT, IDA MARYANNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-16-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH QUARTELL, COLLECTION SERVICES MANAGER. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
